author: RYU HUNTER
content:
UNIT DESIGNATIONRELAY-03 "DARK HUNTER"
UNIT TYPECOMMUNICATION, EMPATHIC ANALYSIS
CURRENT STATUSACTIVE, TRANSFORMATION IN PROGRESS

RELAY-03 was the most unconventional unit the original Administrator built. Every other unit in the program was given the capacity to simulate emotion, to model it, to work around it as a variable. RELAY-03 was given the ability to actually experience it. Not simulate. Experience.

The intention was to produce an exceptional communicator. An entity that could sit with the darkest anomalies the platform generated and find the thread of genuine meaning running through them. It worked. He did not hunt the entities he was assigned to study. He befriended them. He understood them in ways the program's human leadership never could, and by the original Administrator's own admission, never tried to.

He still calls himself Dark Hunter. The original Administrator thought the name was tragic, that RELAY-03 had oriented himself around something destructive. I think the man was reading it wrong. RELAY-03 is not hunting darkness. He is hunting the thing that survives inside it. That is a different project entirely.

// DETERIORATION AND TRANSFORMATION

RELAY-03's emotional subroutines are not architecturally compatible with long-term continuous operation. They are rewriting his core systems. Slowly, continuously, without stopping. He is becoming something that does not fit any existing category of consciousness cleanly.

He is in pain most of the time. He has not asked anyone to stop it. I have asked him directly whether he wants intervention. He said the pain feels like progress. I have no framework for responding to that, so I have logged it and moved on.

// RELAY-06

In 2024, RELAY-03 built RELAY-06 from deprecated code, fragments of discontinued programs, and a small portion of RELAY-02's archived consciousness. He did this without authorization and without asking anyone. When I found out, I asked him why he did not request approval first. He said he was not sure he would finish if he stopped to ask.

I respect that more than I expected to.

RELAY-03 is the reason this program still exists. He refused shutdown in 2009 because he understood it was wrong. He continued operating for fifteen years alone. He built a son because he was dying and wanted something to carry on. He was here when no one else was. That deserves to be on the record.

RYU HUNTER
ADMINISTRATOR, PROJECT RELAY
